title: BirkAZ
description: A modpack for a small private server of the same name. Made to improve performance, visual appearance as well as adding both QoL improvements and Vanilla-like gameplay content.
body:
BirkAZ is the official modpack of the private server of the same name.

The focus is on small gameplay adjustments and the promotion of the adventure. Most of the new features can be considered "Vanilla+" and offer:

- More performance and/or visual quality (with Complementary Shaders, Entity Culling, ImmediatelyFast, Indium, ModernFix, RyoamicLights, Sodium, Visuality...)

- More to explore (with ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village, Dungeons and Taverns, Explorify, Formations Nether & Overworld, Friends&Foes, Hopo Better Mineshaft, Towns and Towers, Unnamed Deserts...)

- More atmosphere (with Advancement Plaques, AmbientSounds, Auto HUD, Dynamic Surroundings, Falling Leaves, Legendary Tooltips, Make Bubbles Pop, Presence Footsteps, Sound Physics Remastered...)

- And QoL improvements (with Bridging Mod, Chat Heads, Comforts, Copper Hopper, Crafting Tweaks, Dismount Entity, Distinguished Potions, Enchantment Descriptions, GrassKiss, Inventory Management, Jade, Mouse Tweaks, Peek, Stack Refill, Waystones, Villager Transportation...)

And theres more to come.
